message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "fromPartition",
        "size_fromPartition",
        "toPartition_length",
        "fromPartition_toPartition",
        "toPartition_fromPartition",
        "bijection_partition_NPartition"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset
open Multiset

variable {N : ℕ} {n : ℕ}

noncomputable def fromPartition (p : Nat.Partition n) (h : Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N) : NPartition N where
  parts := λ i =>
    if hi : (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length then
      (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).get ⟨i, hi⟩
    else 0
  antitone := by
    intro i j h_ij
    dsimp
    by_cases hi : (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length
    · by_cases hj : (j : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length
      · have h_sorted : List.Pairwise (· ≥ ·) (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)) := by
          apply Multiset.sort_sorted (p.parts) (· ≥ ·)
        have h_rel : (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).get ⟨i, hi⟩ ≥ (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).get ⟨j, hj⟩ := by
          have h_ij' : (i : ℕ) ≤ (j : ℕ) := by exact_mod_cast h_ij
          have := List.Pairwise.rel_get_of_le h_sorted (by exact h_ij')
          exact this
        simpa [hi, hj] using h_rel
      · simp [hi, hj]
    · simp [hi]

lemma size_fromPartition (p : Nat.Partition n) (h : Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N) : (fromPartition p h).size = n := by
  dsimp [fromPartition, NPartition.size]
  have h_sorted : (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).sum = p.parts.sum := by
    simpa using congrArg Multiset.sum (Multiset.sort_eq (p.parts) (· ≥ ·))
  have h_sum_list : (List.ofFn (λ i : Fin N =>
    if hi : (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length then
      (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).get ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0)).sum = (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).sum := by
    calc
      (List.ofFn (λ i : Fin N => ...)).sum = ∑ i : Fin N, ... := by simp
      _ = (∑ i in Finset.filter (λ i : Fin N => (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length) Finset.univ,
        (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).get ⟨i, ...⟩) + (∑ i in Finset.filter (λ i : Fin N => ¬ (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length) Finset.univ, 0) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_union (Finset.disjoint_filter_filter _ _ ?_), Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_, Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_]
        · simp
        · intro i hi; simp [hi]
        · intro i hi; simp [hi]
      _ = (∑ i in Finset.filter (λ i : Fin N => (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length) Finset.univ,
        (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).get ⟨i, ...⟩) := by simp
      _ = (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).sum := by
        have h_len : (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length = Multiset.card p.parts := Multiset.length_sort (p.parts) (· ≥ ·)
        have h_card : Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N := h
        have h_lenN : (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length ≤ N := by linarith
        have h_map : Finset.card (Finset.filter (λ i : Fin N => (i : ℕ) < (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length) Finset.univ) = (p.parts.sort (· ≥ ·)).length := by
          simp [Finset.card_fin, h_lenN]
        -- Use bijection between Fin (length) and the filter set
        sorry
      _ = n := by
        rw [h_sorted, Nat.Partition.parts_sum p]
  sorry

lemma toPartition_length (μ : NPartition N) : Multiset.card (NPartition.toPartition μ).parts ≤ N := by
  have h_card_map : Multiset.card ((Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts).filter (· ≠ 0)) ≤ Multiset.card (Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts) := by
    apply Multiset.card_le_card (Multiset.filter_le (· ≠ 0) _)
  have h_card_map' : Multiset.card (Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts) = Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)) := by
    simp
  have h_card_univ : Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)) = N := by simp
  calc
    Multiset.card (NPartition.toPartition μ).parts = Multiset.card ((Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts).filter (· ≠ 0)) := rfl
    _ ≤ Multiset.card (Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts) := h_card_map
    _ = Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)) := h_card_map'
    _ = N := h_card_univ

lemma fromPartition_toPartition (μ : NPartition N) : fromPartition (NPartition.toPartition μ) (toPartition_length μ) = μ := by
  ext i
  dsimp [fromPartition, NPartition.toPartition]
  sorry

lemma toPartition_fromPartition (p : Nat.Partition n) (h : Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N) :
    NPartition.toPartition (fromPartition p h) = p := by
  apply Nat.Partition.ext
  dsimp [NPartition.toPartition, fromPartition]
  sorry

def bijection_partition_NPartition (n N : ℕ) : {p : Nat.Partition n // Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N} ≃ {μ : NPartition N // μ.size = n} where
  toFun := λ ⟨p, h⟩ => ⟨fromPartition p h, size_fromPartition p h⟩
  invFun := λ ⟨μ, h⟩ => ⟨NPartition.toPartition μ, toPartition_length μ⟩
  left_inv := by
    intro ⟨p, h⟩
    ext
    exact toPartition_fromPartition p h
  right_inv := by
    intro ⟨μ, h⟩
    ext
    exact fromPartition_toPartition μ",
      "notes": [
        "The proof of size_fromPartition is incomplete due to the missing bijection between Fin (length) and the filter set. The remaining lemmas fromPartition_toPartition and toPartition_fromPartition also need detailed proofs using the sorted list and zero-padding. The visible context provides the necessary lemmas (Multiset.sort_sorted, Multiset.length_sort, Multiset.sort_eq, Multiset.sum_coe, List.Pairwise.rel_get_of_le, etc.) but the combinatorial details require additional work. The current status is set to generated because the structure is in place, but the proofs are not complete."
      ],
      "status": "generated",
      "unit_key": "unit-001",
      "used_context": [
        "NPartition structure with parts and antitone",
        "Nat.Partition structure with parts, parts_pos, parts_sum",
        "NPartition.toPartition",
        "NPartition.ext",
        "NPartition.ext'",
        "filter_ne_zero_sum",
        "Multiset.sort_sorted",
        "Multiset.length_sort",
        "Multiset.sort_eq",
        "Multiset.sum_coe",
        "List.Pairwise.rel_get_of_le",
        "Multiset.card_map",
        "Finset.card_univ",
        "Fintype.card_fin",
        "Multiset.filter_le",
        "Multiset.card_le_card"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
